brief_notes: Elegant conceptual framework with a clear null-model approach. Tables report t-statistics, p-values, Cohen's d, residual values with CIs, and model cosine similarities. The force-vs-speed dissociation is compelling and well-validated against clinical literature. The digit span encoding-vs-retrieval finding adds breadth. Model validation across alternatives (Lasso, 5-dataset Ridge) strengthens claims. Sample size (n=16) is adequate for fMRI.
